name: xchatbot
description: Cloudflare Workers 消息处理机器人

scripts.plugin-admin:smoke: tsc -p tsconfig.json --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --outDir .tmp-plugin-admin-smoke --rootDir src && node ./scripts/plugin-admin-smoke.cjs
scripts.d1:tables:local: wrangler d1 execute xbotdata --local --command "SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' ORDER BY name;"
scripts.d1:tables:remote: wrangler d1 execute xbotdata --remote --command "SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' ORDER BY name;"
scripts.kv:seed:local: wrangler kv key put --binding XBOT_KV "plugins:common:mapping" --path "./_docs/plugin-config/common-plugins.json" --local && wrangler kv key put --binding XBOT_KV "plugins:parameterized:mapping" --path "./_docs/plugin-config/common-plugins-dynamic.json" --local && wrangler kv key put --binding XBOT_KV "plugins:workflow:mapping" --path "./_docs/plugin-config/common-plugins-workflow.json" --local
scripts.kv:seed:remote: wrangler kv key put --binding XBOT_KV "plugins:common:mapping" --path "./_docs/plugin-config/common-plugins.json" --remote && wrangler kv key put --binding XBOT_KV "plugins:parameterized:mapping" --path "./_docs/plugin-config/common-plugins-dynamic.json" --remote && wrangler kv key put --binding XBOT_KV "plugins:workflow:mapping" --path "./_docs/plugin-config/common-plugins-workflow.json" --remote
scripts.dev:seed: npm run kv:seed:local && npm run dev
